products.description: The Flowerpot VP2 Pendant by &Tradition, designed by Verner Panton in 1968, is formed from two opposed glossy hemispheres in a wide palette of lacquered colors, throwing a soft downward glow. A defining icon of pop-era Danish design. By &Tradition.

finishes.name: Cobalt Blue and Twilight Blue Pattern

products.material: Powder-coated/lacquered metal (two hemispheres)
products.warranty: &Tradition / manufacturer limited warranty (typically 2 years)

products.description: A drum/barrel-shaped pendant with a slatted natural-wood-veneer body surrounding a white acrylic diffuser, handcrafted in Brazil by Accord Iluminacao. The warm wood slats create a soft, patterned glow. Available in several wood finishes such as Imbuia.
products.material: Natural wood veneer body; white acrylic diffuser
products.warranty: Accord Iluminacao warrants its handcrafted lighting against manufacturing defects; standard coverage is approximately 1 year (verify current terms with the dealer). Natural wood variation is not a defect.

products.description: The Canoa LED pendant features two long pieces of natural wood veneer that meet to form an architectural canoe shape, with light diffused through white acrylic. It is handcrafted in Brazil and includes an integrated 32W LED module (3000K, 90 CRI). Offered in finishes such as American Walnut, Imbuia, Maple and Teak.
products.material: Natural wood veneer; white acrylic diffuser; integrated LED
products.warranty: Accord Iluminacao warrants its handcrafted lighting against manufacturing defects; standard coverage is approximately 1 year (verify current terms with the dealer). Natural wood variation is not a defect.

products.description: Knit-Wit 45 Oval by Made by Hand (designed by Iskos-Berlin, distributed in the US by Ameico) is a pleated, knitted textile pendant whose folded fabric forms a soft sculptural drum that diffuses a warm, even glow. The collapsible shade ships flat and expands into shape. Made in Denmark.
products.material: Pleated knitted polyester textile, metal hardware
products.warranty: Made by Hand 2-year warranty against defects

products.description: The Jakobsson Table Lamp (designed by Hans-Agne Jakobsson, produced by Yamagiwa, distributed by Ameico) features a shade of overlapping thin pine veneer slats that filter a warm, dappled glow. Each slat is hand-assembled for a natural, organic light quality. Made in Japan.
products.material: Pine veneer slats, metal/wood frame
products.warranty: Manufacturer limited warranty against defects (Yamagiwa/Ameico)

products.description: Inspired by modern Danish design, the Aaron chair is a sculptural statement piece that's a delight to view from any angle. A solid walnut or gray ash base securely cradles the contoured seat structure, while subtle curves and refined tailoring let it pair easily with many styles. It features a tight back, loose seat cushion, and single-needle top-stitched seams.
products.material: Top-grain leather or fabric over a kiln-dried hardwood frame; premium high-density, high-resiliency foam cushions; exposed solid wood base in natural walnut or gray ash.
products.warranty: Limited lifetime warranty on frame and seating suspension; 5 years against defects in materials and workmanship. Handcrafted in Dallas, Texas.

products.description: A modern take on a classic look, the Ada Comfort Recliner features a delicate rolled arm that blends with transitional, traditional, and eclectic decors. Its curvy, sleek frame is accentuated by single-needle top-stitching, and the patented mechanism lets the back and footrest operate independently for an infinitely adjustable, perfectly customized position. Choose a Brushed Metal swivel base or solid wood legs in natural walnut or gray ash.
products.material: Top-grain leather or fabric over a kiln-dried hardwood frame; premium high-density, high-resiliency foam; patented Infinity reclining mechanism; choice of brushed-metal swivel or wood base.
products.warranty: Limited lifetime warranty on frame and seating suspension; 3-year warranty on the reclining mechanism (and power motor where applicable), 1-year on battery pack; 5 years on materials and workmanship. Made in the USA.

products.description: The perfect blend of traditional and modern, the Adley Comfort Recliner features a timeless rolled arm that blends seamlessly with any decor depending on the covering. Bensen developed a unique pivoting system that uses gravity and the sofa's own weight to lock itself into place, and its welded steel frame provides strength while keeping it relatively lightweight compared to clunky wood-framed models. Cushioning is high-resilience foam layered in differing densities, with a removable fabric cover or leather upholstery. Designed by Niels Bendtsen.
products.material: Welded steel frame, high-resilience layered foam, chrome, fabric or leather upholstery
products.warranty: No formal published warranty term; Bensen frames are engineered for long-term use (per bensen.com Product Care).

products.description: Nodding to both traditional Danish and Japanese influences, the Tokyo armchair exhibits a continuous back curve that connects to the legs with traditional mortise and tenon joints. Designed by Niels Bendtsen for Bensen.

products.description: The archetypal club chair takes a new direction with the U Turn, a handsome, generously scaled update with a modest footprint. A distinctive undercut base provides foot space for greater ease when getting out of the chair, and it swivels a full 360 degrees (also available with self-return). Designed by Niels Bendtsen for Bensen.

products.description: At Loll we have always been inspired by original design and when we first set out to make an Adirondack chair it had to be our own version. But truly we are all just making an iteration of the original Adirondack chair. The one that has always inspired us is the first, the Westport Chair designed by Thomas Lee in 1903 for his summer cottage overlooking Lake Champlain in Westport, NY. The Westport is undeniably the most iconic American outdoor lounge chair and the original design that spawned countless varieties all based on that 11 piece design statement.

products.description: The Anniston Collection is a washable rug with traditional motifs in beautifully saturated and distressed tones. This durable area rug is power-loomed of polyester and designed for the busiest rooms of the home-living rooms, bedrooms, kitchens, hallways, and more. It can be washed in a home washing machine without an agitator, depending on the size. Any rug size 5' x 7'6" or smaller, including all runners, can fit into a washing machine that's 3.4 cubic feet or bigger; 6' x 9' rugs require a washer that's 4.2 cubic feet or bigger, 7'6" x 9'6" rugs require a washer that's 4.8 cubic feet or bigger, 9' x 12' rugs must be washed in a commercial washer with at least a 60-lb capacity. Wash in cold water, delicate cycle, with mild detergent, and no bleach, hang dry or lay flat to dry.

products.description: Heritage is Loloi's best collection yet. Inspired by Amir Loloi's favorite vintage rugs, the collection recreates a vintage aesthetic and variable-pile texture using a new craft process that was invented specifically for this rug, a process that took over two years to complete. Motifs in Heritage are woven with individual threads to create the intricate design, including white cotton threads that mimic a vintage rug's authentic wear patterns. The result is a stunning area rug with an uncanny resemblance to an antique textile. Heritage is made in Egypt of polypropylene, polyester, and wool for thicker, variable texture and soft blended pile. This collection is OEKO-TEX certified, ensuring its materials don't contain harmful substances. Patent pending.

Designed by Niels Bendtsen for Bensen.
products.material: Internal metal frame, high-resiliency foam with down cushioning, fabric or leather upholstery
products.warranty: No formal published warranty term; Bensen sofa frames are engineered to last 15-20 years with normal daily use (per bensen.com Product Care).

products.description: Our Aurora Lounge Chair may not guarantee you a light show, but it will always be the right place to enjoy the outdoors. It's durable stainless-steel frame with a rust-proof powder coat creates a solid foundation for this airy collection. Featuring a taller seat height, the Aurora Lounge Chair allows you to sit and stand with ease. You won't want to leave these plush cushions anytime soon though!
products.material: Recycled HDPE (single-origin recycled plastic) with stainless steel frame, Sunbrella performance fabric cushions
products.warranty: 5-year limited residential warranty: all components are warranted against defects for five years from shipment for residential use; aluminum inserts and stainless steel hardware are also warranted 5 years; Sunbrella fabric 5 years, cushion inserts 1 year, furniture covers 3 years. Hardware exposed to salt water is not warranted.

products.description: Our Aurora Sofa may not guarantee you a light show, but it will always be the right place to enjoy the outdoors. products.description: A long sofa/console table from Gat Creek built from solid North American hardwood and made to order in Berkeley Springs, West Virginia. Shown in ash with a polished-nickel Grace knob, it is offered across many finishes in ash, cherry, maple or painted options. Its slim profile suits entryways and behind sofas.

products.warranty: Gat Creek warrants its furniture against defects in workmanship, material or construction occurring during normal household use; claims handled through the authorized Gat Creek retailer.

products.description: A vary-sized set of two boucle pillows can be styled just about anywhere for a fun pop of texture. The performance fabric is specially created to withstand spills, stains, high traffic and wear for long-term comfort and durability. Larger pillow measures 12.5" in diameter; smaller pillow measures 10" in diameter.

products.warranty: Four Hands does not publish a formal written warranty; 1 year from invoice date against quality/defective issues, reviewed case-by-case. Residential use only.

products.description: A Canadel dining bench, part of the brand's made-to-order custom dining program. Handcrafted in Quebec from solid Canadian birch and finished by hand; available in Canadel's range of stain colors and upholstered seat options. Built to order.

products.warranty: Canadel limited warranty: 2 years against defects in materials and workmanship from date of delivery; original purchaser, residential use only. Transit/handling damage must be reported within 10 days.

products.description: There is an offhand sense of luxury to Bensen's Side series. The round version makes the perfect accompaniment next to a chair or can even be used as a small coffee table. Its tabletop comes in a choice of four solid marble shades, with a slender metal frame in either chrome or bronzato finish. Designed by Niels Bendtsen for Bensen.
products.material: Steel/chrome frame, solid marble top
products.warranty: No formal published warranty term; Bensen builds to last with proper care, and marble is a natural material requiring routine maintenance (per bensen.com Product Care).

products.description: The Berger Swivel Chair features an innovative barrel-back design with stylish detail that works from every angle. The unique back cradles you and creates a striking look, while a deep cushion refines comfort and the swivel mechanism brings relaxing motion and function to this irresistible seat.
products.material: Top-grain leather or fabric over a kiln-dried hardwood frame; premium high-density, high-resiliency foam; swivel base.
products.warranty: Limited lifetime warranty on frame and seating suspension; 5 years against defects in materials and workmanship. Made in the USA.

products.description: Power-loomed of polypropylene and polyester pile in Turkey, the Bianca Collection is constructed to withstand heavy foot traffic. From contemporary designs to traditional patterns, this highly durable collection offers an option for all design styles.
products.material: polypropylene blend, power-loomed
products.warranty: Loloi does not publish a consumer product warranty; per Loloi's stated policy, returns are accepted within 30 days for non-defective items, 7 days for defective items, and 4 days for shortage or missing-item claims. Care instructions are provided per product; professional rug cleaning is recommended.

products.description: The Bink 1025 is a mobile laptop stand, side table, and C-table with a cantilevered base that slides under a sofa or chair for easy access. It supports laptops up to 15 inches and up to 25 lbs, in an all-metal construction for indoor or limited outdoor use.

products.warranty: Pablo limited 2-year warranty against defects in material and workmanship (excludes replaceable bulbs)

products.material: High-performance fabric upholstery, molded foam, steel frame, nylon base

products.description: With stacking modular drawers, Brix can be arranged in nearly endless configurations. The pre-assembled modules combine via a simple pin-and-cam mechanism to create rigid units that can be stacked to any height, with a steel underframe ensuring stability. Drawers are finished with high-gloss lacquer and open with a silent push-latch, on a choice of steel fin legs or a low panel base. Designed by Niels Bendtsen for Bensen.

products.description: With the bravura of Italian craftsmanship, Circa is defined by its wraparound curved backrest and waterfall front edge. The finely tailored upholstery augments the graceful form, while inner layers of variable-density foam over a webbing-supported seat ensure extended comfort. The airy metal base comes in chrome-plated, brushed, or powder-coated finishes. Designed by Niels Bendtsen for Bensen.
products.material: Brushed or powder-coated metal base, variable-density foam/polyurethane over webbing, fabric or leather upholstery
products.warranty: No formal published warranty term; Bensen frames are engineered for long-term use (per bensen.com Product Care).

products.description: Circa's flowing shape envelops the body and provides impressive comfort within a small footprint in the expanded lounge chair. A responsive webbing seat concealed within the formed foam cradles the sitter, sturdily set on an angled steel base in a choice of finishes. Handsomely made in Italy, its distinctive arc silhouette and waterfall seat cushion suit a range of upholstery textiles and leathers. Designed by Niels Bendtsen for Bensen.
products.material: Angled steel base, formed foam over responsive webbing, fabric or leather upholstery
products.warranty: No formal published warranty term; Bensen frames are engineered for long-term use (per bensen.com Product Care).

products.warranty: Pablo limited 2-year warranty against defects in material and workmanship (excludes replaceable bulbs)

products.description: The Collar Dining Chair provides a comfortable seating experience with a distinctive backrest inspired by a shirt collar. It features a flexible polyurethane body supported by a sturdy metal frame, with a base available in two oak finishes to match various settings. Designed by Niels Bendtsen for Bensen.
products.material: Metal frame, flexible polyurethane body, oak base
products.warranty: No formal published warranty term; Bensen builds to last with proper care (per bensen.com Product Care).

products.description: A deft play on midcentury furnishings, the Edward Sectional was inspired by renowned design icon Edward Wormley. With varied-size sections, the highly adaptable seating has a visual lightness and contemporary silhouette, built with thoughtful innovations including a steel frame with a webbing suspension system. A single seat cushion with button detail references Wormley's era, while scattered down-filled cushions and a slim backrest with baffled back cushions provide lumbar comfort. Bronzato-finish metal legs.

Composed of individual modules, its seat and back cushions are engineered with a layered foam core and wrapped in a generous amount of feathers and down for sink-into-it comfort. The casual yet tailored look uses slightly oversized cushion covers attached by velcro and removable for easy cleaning. Designed by Niels Bendtsen for Bensen.
products.material: Internal metal frame, layered foam core wrapped in feathers and down, fabric or leather upholstery

products.description: Ralph Rapson liked to sketch and he was quite fond of dreaming-up furniture. With this whim of a Bar Cart one can easily picture Ralph with an ice filled low ball glass floating beside him while he dreamt up a rolling bar where he could mix up the next. As all our Rapson works, staying true to the drawing is crucial to us, and we think Ralph would have liked the function and look found in this first ever Rapson Bar Cart. Quench any whim with Loll's Rapson Bar Cart and the entire Rapson Collection .

products.description: Going through the impeccable furniture sketches of midcentury architect Ralph Rapson could possibly be one of the best ways to spend a cold winter afternoon in Minnesota. We found his Cave Chair illustration and immediately thought it would be a great collaboration piece that fit the aesthetic of Loll's modern outdoor furniture. Ralph originally conceived this chair in 1943 as plywood with a cushion, but it was never actually produced. Part of Loll's Rapson® Collection , this perfectly oversized, futuristic, comfortable and fun, modern Cave Chair will induce hours of conversation – whether you're sitting in it or just walking by.
products.material: Recycled HDPE (single-origin recycled plastic) with cushions

products.description: Ralph liked to sketch furniture as much as buildings and often his furniture drawings were just filler for a room scene in a much larger context. While plying the leaden waves of the sea of Ralph's sketches, we spotted this cocktail table and the accompanying side table . Staying true to the drawing is crucial to us, and we think we got these two just as Ralph would have liked them. Both these mid-century tables will work superbly with the Rapson® Collection but they are strong enough to stand alone.

products.material: Top-grain leather or fabric over a kiln-dried hardwood frame; high-resiliency foam seat cushions, custom-built to order in the USA.
products.warranty: American Leather limited lifetime warranty on the frame and seating suspension; coverage on leather, fabric and foam per American Leather's standard warranty terms.

products.description: The Talia Table Lamp features a slim arching stem and a thin disc head that pivots to deliver soft, dimmable LED light, set on a weighted base. Its elegant, minimal silhouette suits desks and side tables. Designed by Pablo Studio.
products.material: Aluminum, weighted base
products.warranty: Pablo limited 2-year warranty against defects in material and workmanship (excludes replaceable bulbs)

products.description: Natural teak roots add a touch of organic texture to spaces indoors or out. Each has unique character, with dramatic highs and lows in the finish. Over time, teak weathers and greys in the sun for a found feel. Safe for outdoor spaces; cover or store indoors during inclement weather and when not in use.
products.material: Aged natural teak root
products.warranty: Four Hands does not publish a formal written warranty; 1 year from invoice date against quality/defective issues, reviewed case-by-case. Residential use only.

products.description: The Big Easy from Younger & Co. is all about sinking into deep, squishy comfort, with foam-encased spring cushions and soft Trillium filling that is cozy yet supportive. Modular and available with track or wide arms and 40-inch or 44-inch seat depths. Designed and crafted in Thomasville, North Carolina.
products.material: Kiln-dried hardwood frame, foam-encased spring cushions with Trillium fiber fill, fabric or leather upholstery
products.warranty: Younger Furniture: limited lifetime warranty on frame and on cushion foam resiliency; 10-year warranty on springs; residential use, original purchaser.

products.description: The Carter Chair from Younger & Co. is inspired by mid-century modern silhouettes, with crisp track-arm styling and defining nailhead trim for a versatile, transitional look. Available as a swivel; bench-crafted to order in North Carolina.

products.warranty: Younger Furniture: limited lifetime warranty on frame and on cushion foam resiliency; 10-year warranty on springs; residential use, original purchaser.

products.warranty: Younger Furniture: limited lifetime warranty on frame and on cushion foam resiliency; 10-year warranty on springs; residential use, original purchaser.

products.description: Torii is recognized by its closely spaced back legs, broad seat, and small arched backrest that references the traditional Shinto shrine gateways of Japan. The minimal silhouette is rooted in carefully crafted traditional wood joinery, making the chair remarkably sturdy and soothingly comfortable for both residential and commercial environments. Available with a wood or upholstered seat in solid ash, oak, or walnut. Designed by Niels Bendtsen for Bensen.
products.material: Solid ash, oak, or walnut with traditional wood joinery; optional leather or fabric seat
products.warranty: No formal published warranty term; Bensen solid-wood pieces are finished with a polyurethane lacquer and built to last with proper care (per bensen.com Product Care).

products.description: The Torii series includes a stool characterized by the same expressive simplicity and notable arched backrest as the original chair. Its minimal appearance belies a sturdy construction employing both traditional wood joinery and unseen steel pins reinforcing the backrest, and it pairs the appealing, smooth wood grain with an aluminum foot rail and an upholstered seat in premium fabric or leather. Offered in counter and bar heights. Designed by Niels Bendtsen for Bensen.
products.material: Solid ash, oak, or walnut with steel pin reinforcement, aluminum foot rail, fabric or leather seat
products.warranty: No formal published warranty term; Bensen solid-wood pieces are finished with a polyurethane lacquer and built to last with proper care (per bensen.com Product Care).

products.warranty: Pablo limited 2-year warranty against defects in material and workmanship (excludes replaceable bulbs)

products.warranty: Pablo limited 2-year warranty against defects in material and workmanship (excludes replaceable bulbs)

products.description: The U Sofa is a 2-seat sofa that complements Bensen's U Turn series of swivel lounge chairs with similarly rounded lines and a tapering base. A soft down seat and uncluttered design make it ideal for residential or contract use, while a clever seat undercut provides helpful foot space. An internal steel frame and injection-molded foam create engineered comfort and a tailored appearance, with velcro-attached fabric covers for easy cleaning. Designed by Niels Bendtsen for Bensen.
products.material: Internal steel frame, injection-molded foam/polyurethane, down seat, fabric or leather upholstery
products.warranty: No formal published warranty term; Bensen frames are engineered for long-term use (per bensen.com Product Care).

products.description: Designed with a dual nature, the square Uno ottoman is equally at home for relaxation or as a side table. Clean geometric styling adds further versatility to the double-duty ottoman-side table. The ever-ready hidden tray is available in an Acorn, Espresso, or Walnut finish.

products.description: A wall clock divided into four seamlessly pieced sections, each graced with a luxurious walnut veneer, with intersecting iron rods finished in metallic gold. Quartz movement ensures accurate timekeeping (requires one AA battery). A warm, elegant accent for a wall.
products.material: Walnut veneer with iron rods in metallic gold; quartz movement
products.warranty: Uttermost one-year limited warranty against defects in materials and workmanship under normal use.

products.description: The Clarisse Collection is a traditional area rug with a classic floral design in soft, colorful palettes for timeless home decor. Clarisse is power-loomed of polyester in Turkey, an easy-to-clean rug for living rooms, bedrooms, dining rooms, or other high-traffic spaces. This collection is OEKO-TEX certified, ensuring its materials do not contain harmful substances.

products.warranty: Loloi does not publish a consumer product warranty; per Loloi's stated policy, returns are accepted within 30 days for non-defective items, 7 days for defective items, and 4 days for shortage or missing-item claims. Care instructions are provided per product; professional rug cleaning is recommended. This collection is OEKO-TEX certified.

Power-loomed in Turkey of durable polyester, an ideal material for high-traffic living rooms, bedrooms, and offices.

products.description: The Barrow Collection by Jeremiah Brent x Loloi is a hand-tufted area rug with a bold linear design inspired by modern art and classical architecture. The rugs pile is a blend of wool and jute for a stable, substantial feel that can ground living rooms, dining rooms, bedrooms, and more. This collection is made in India and Goodweave-certified, ensuring our commitment to ethical production and the support of weavers communities. Some shedding is expected and a natural characteristic of wool rugs; we recommend vacuuming frequently without a beater bar.

products.description: An asymmetrical geometric pattern in most designs gives the Walker Collection a unique visual depth and subtly varied pile. The carved lines on the richly toned rug create a tiling effect, reminiscent of stained glass or stone work. The area rug's minimal-modern design embodies the Carrier and Company collaboration with Loloi, which combines classic craftsmanship with a contemporary approach. Hand-knotted of wool and other fibers, this collection is one of our most durable handmade constructions, intended to last for generations. Made in India and GoodWeave-certified, ensuring our commitment to ethical production and the support of weavers' communities.

products.description: The Metro sofa from Bensen — clean lines and a low, contemporary profile. Made to order in Bensen's full fabric and leather program.
Bensen's Loft — a relaxed, modular upholstered seating system that configures to the room. Made to order.
The stool companion to Bensen's Stax chair — stackable, minimal, modern. Made to order.
The stool and side chair in Bensen's Circa family — soft, rounded modern seating. Made to order.
Bensen's Collar lounge chair and two-seater — a clean upholstered form with a tailored collar detail. Made to order.
An entryway piece from Bensen — a modern bench for the threshold, spare and useful. Made to order.
Bensen's Able table — a clean, minimal surface in the Able family. Quietly architectural. Made to order.
Bensen's Able desk and low console — spare, modern work and storage surfaces. Made to order.
Bensen's Area table — an understated occasional table with a refined, modern stance. Made to order.
Bensen's Homework desk — a compact, modern work surface built for real rooms. Made to order.
Bensen's Radii coffee table — a soft-edged round that anchors the Radii family. Made to order.

The Cirrus Comfort Air is as chic as it is inviting. A plush, channeled back and seat cushion encased in down provides instant comfort, and a revolutionary patented mechanism responds to your every move for infinite ways to relax. Available in three sizes on a four-star base (Antique Brass, Burnished Bronze, or Polished Nickel) or a disc base in Polished Nickel or Natural Walnut. Ottoman sold separately.
products.material: Top-grain leather or fabric over a kiln-dried hardwood frame; down-encased channeled cushions; patented Comfort Air reclining mechanism; metal or walnut base.
products.warranty: Limited lifetime warranty on frame and seating suspension; 3-year warranty on the reclining mechanism and power motor, 1-year on battery pack; 5 years on materials and workmanship. Made in the USA.

products.description: The Cloud Comfort Air pays homage to the sleekness of American Leather's iconic design, featuring a tailored track arm and chic, customizable base. A revolutionary patented mechanism responds to your every move for infinite ways to relax. Available in three sizes on a disc base (Natural Walnut or Brushed Metal) or four-star base in Antique Brass, Burnished Bronze, or Polished Nickel. Ottoman sold separately.

Contoured taper arms that nearly reach the floor give Como its graceful, timeless silhouette, while plush buttonless tufting on the back and seat cushions provides superior comfort with every move. This zero-gravity recliner conforms to your movements; choose from four bases including a natural walnut four-star base. Ottoman sold separately.
products.material: Top-grain leather or fabric over a kiln-dried hardwood frame; buttonless-tufted high-resiliency cushions; patented Comfort Air reclining mechanism; four base options including natural walnut four-star base.
products.warranty: Limited lifetime warranty on frame and seating suspension; 3-year warranty on the reclining mechanism and power motor, 1-year on battery pack; 5 years on materials and workmanship. Made in the USA.

Each Comfort Air features a revolutionary mechanism that responds to your every move. Available in three sizes on a four-star base in Antique Brass, Burnished Bronze, or Polished Nickel, or a disc base in Natural Walnut or Polished Nickel. Ottoman sold separately.
products.material: Top-grain leather or fabric over a kiln-dried hardwood frame; down-infused high-resiliency cushions; patented Comfort Air reclining mechanism; metal or walnut base.

Splayed track arms and a waterfall back and seat complete the look; available in multiple sizes, ottoman sold separately.

Channel quilting on both the back and seat cushions encase you for the best reclining experience. Lanier’s low profile follows the shape of classic automotive designs as it tapers in width from top to bottom. Discover remarkable comfort in every hand-stitched detail of this modern rocking chair.

Alternatively, choose the Lumen Power to make this functionality seamless with the push of a button.

The rolling shape of Ontario’s arms highlight this glider recliner chairs form as they gently slope from front to back. Its soft transitional style is perfect to complement any living space from modern to traditional. Both back and seat cushions feature refined detail that gives Ontario its tailored look. Its waterfall back cushion seamlessly meets with the seat cushion for premium comfort. The combination of this glider chair with ottoman provides a hammock experience while you glide back and forth.

Customize the Pileus by choosing any leather, fabric, or bring your own personal covering. A disc base is available in Natural Walnut or Brushed Metal, while a four star base is available in Antique Brass, Burnished Bronze or Polished Nickel.

This unique upholstery pattern contours to your body, allowing for a personal modern lounge experience. Experience a heightened sense of comfort with the Rainier as you lean back and recline in full extension.

products.description: Sculptural slopes and tailored precision – motion concealed behind a quiet, low profile. Sleek and architectural, the Soho provides a sturdy, structured form with smartly placed curves to create a building-like drama that anchors any contemporary space. With a subtle hidden motion, a legrest seamlessly emerges at the touch of a button. Spanning from a domestic metropolitan style to a european air, the piece seamlessly transitions between any modern design aesthetic, offering comfort and a strong design presence.

products.description: Delta is all smooth surfaces, defined by a single seat cushion and softly rounded right angles. Its comfortable slant comes from soft down-fill over a multi-layer seat on a webbed frame, and large back cushions can be supplemented with smaller throw-pillow-style cushions as desired. A built-in steel frame allows for corner or inset-foot placement. Designed by Niels Bendtsen for Bensen; offered in 175, 210, and 245 cm widths.

products.warranty: No formal published warranty term; Bensen sofa frames are engineered to last 15-20 years with normal daily use (per bensen.com Product Care).

products.description: For smaller spaces, Lite includes a scaled-down 2-seat model with the collection's signature geometric look and nickel-finish base. It is fabricated with a steel-reinforced laminated wood frame and a spring suspension system adapted from automobiles, delivering comfort while taking up minimal space. Cushions are CFC-free polyurethane softened by a fabric wrap, with the back cushions baffled to prevent shifting of feathers; fabric covers are removable. An iconic Niels Bendtsen design for Bensen.
products.material: Steel-reinforced laminated wood frame, automobile-style spring suspension, CFC-free polyurethane and feather cushions, nickel-finish metal base, fabric or leather upholstery
products.warranty: No formal published warranty term; Bensen sofa frames are engineered to last 15-20 years with normal daily use (per bensen.com Product Care).

products.description: Clean-lined and comfortable, the Neo 2 Seater adapts the series' geometric look in a sofa designed for smaller spaces. Innovative construction underscores the straightforward seating, handmade by a single Bensen craftsman, with a steel-reinforced laminated wood frame and an automobile-style steel-spring suspension. Seat cushions are CFC-free polyurethane softened by a continuous fiber wrap, and back cushions are baffled to prevent shifting of feathers. Designed by Niels Bendtsen.
products.material: Steel-reinforced laminated wood frame, automobile-style steel-spring suspension, CFC-free polyurethane and feather cushions, powder-coated metal legs, fabric or leather upholstery

products.description: With enriched shapes and unexpected details, the Geometric solid oak dining table is a statement piece, equally at home in the dining room or workspace; softened edges and natural lines offset its generous length.

products.warranty: 2-year warranty against manufacturing defects. Solid wood — natural cracking or slight movement as the piece adapts to your home's humidity is expected and not a defect.

products.description: A recliner-and-ottoman set from Conform's Timeout line, hand-crafted to order in Sweden. It uses memory-foam cushions over a molded bent-ply seat shell, with leather, fabric or sheepskin upholstery and a choice of swivel or four-leg bases. Reclines for relaxed lounging, with the matching ottoman about 20"W x 15"D x 16"H.
products.material: Molded bent-ply shell; memory foam; leather, fabric or sheepskin upholstery
products.warranty: Conform provides a long-term warranty on its recliners (10 years on the comparable Globe model); made to order in Sweden.
